---
id: get-property-by-slug
title: "Get property by place and property slug"
description: "Look up a property using its URL-friendly slugs (place and property). Returns the same full detail as getPropertyById. Use this when you have a human-readable URL like '/porlock/meadow-cottage' rather than a numeric ID."
sidebar_label: "Get property by place and property slug"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get property by place and property slug"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/{placeSlug}/{propertySlug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Look up a property using its URL-friendly slugs (place and property). Returns the same full detail as getPropertyById. Use this when you have a human-readable URL like "/porlock/meadow-cottage" rather than a numeric ID.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./get-property-by-slug.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./get-property-by-slug.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./get-property-by-slug.StatusCodes.json")}
>
